meta.title: Fluxframe Lab - Cinematic Interface
meta.description: A richer Lusion-like cinematic demo generated with cinematic-site-builder.

copy.title: A living launch system for spatial products
copy.body: Fluxframe turns product narrative, interface proof, and real-time motion into one scroll-driven visual system.

copy.title: A tangible object, even before assets arrive
copy.body: A procedural orbit scene gives Codex a strong default when the user has no 3D model yet.

copy.title: Screens bend into the same progress state
copy.body: Shader planes make product imagery, video stills, or case visuals feel embedded in the WebGL stage.

copy.title: A gallery that moves like a camera pass
copy.body: Repeated work or proof cards can stay semantic while the visual layer carries depth and parallax.

copy.title: From prompt to verified cinematic site
copy.body: The plugin now includes richer presets, page-aware config, fallbacks, and build smoke validation.

copy.title: A launch page shaped as an interactive film
copy.body: The case route proves the same runtime can carry a second page with its own chapter pacing.

copy.title: Interface modules reveal the operating model
copy.body: Floating modules, rails, and phase-driven opacity create a technical proof section without custom code.

copy.title: A reusable cinematic system, not a one-off trick
copy.body: Codex edits content and parameters while the plugin preserves the visual architecture.
